question: Will the amount of money representing all credit card loans and other revolving plans made by commercial banks in the US have increased by 2026-04-19 as compared to its value on 2026-04-12?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/CCLACBW027SBOG once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-04-12 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-04-02) was 1066.403. (The latest value released in Consumer Loans: Credit Cards and Other Revolving Plans, All Commercial Banks from the release H.8 Assets and Liabilities of Commercial Banks in the United States.)
background:
